description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a pouch and graphic print on the frontWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print FittingRegular FitIf you are a night owl and prefer becoming energetic only at night, then join the tribe of those who get alive after sundown. Send out your love to all other members of your gang with this green tee from jealous 21. Team it with white shorts, black ankle lenght pants or skinny jeans for an outing with friends and look cool all the way. Carry it in that cute pouch for quick weekend getaways or sleepovers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
